mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua打开了DevTools模拟drag事件（违反浏览器约束），通过JS模拟dragenter/dragover/drop后dropzone样式未变化（classes始终为'dropzone'，style为null），但无法确认isDragReject状态是否正确重置，测试方法不完整
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Console output shows after dragenter/dragover classes: 'dropzone' style: null; after drop classes: 'dropzone' style: null; 500ms after drop classes: 'dropzone' style: null. Classes are always just 'dropzone' with no style changes. Need to observe visual state during actual drag which cannot be properly simulated via DevTools JS.
